hooks.command: node -e "const f=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||''; const forbidden=['.env','.env.local','.env.production','credentials','secrets']; const hit=forbidden.some(k=>f.includes(k)); if(hit){console.error('BLOCKED: Refusing to write to sensitive file: '+f); process.exit(2);}"

node -e "const cmd=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND||''; const danger=['git push --force','git reset --hard','rm -rf','drop table','DELETE FROM']; const hit=danger.find(d=>cmd.includes(d)); if(hit){console.error('BLOCKED: Dangerous command detected: '+hit); process.exit(2);}"
hooks.description: Block force-push, hard-reset, and destructive commands

hooks.command: node -e "const f=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||''; const hubspotFiles=['.hubl','.html','.graphql','.json']; const isHubSpot=hubspotFiles.some(ext=>f.endsWith(ext))&&f.includes('hair-solutions-portal'); if(isHubSpot&&f.endsWith('.json')){try{require('fs');const c=require('fs').readFileSync(f,'utf8');JSON.parse(c);console.log('JSON valid: '+f);}catch(e){console.error('INVALID JSON in HubSpot file: '+f+' — '+e.message); process.exit(1);}}"
hooks.description: Validate JSON files in hair-solutions-portal after write
